evaluators.name: Cheapest Seated Ticket Earliest Berlin Sept 2025 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved exactly one seated ticket at the lowest available seated price for the earliest Berlin concert date in September 2025.

evaluators.name: Acoustic 2018-22 Playlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the playlist 'Acoustic 2018-22' contains exactly the 4 most recent acoustic tracks released between 2018 and 2022, in correct order.

evaluators.name: Cheapest T-Shirt & Best Hoodie Under $80 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart contains exactly one medium T-shirt and one medium hoodie, both rated at least 4 stars, where the T-shirt is the cheapest qualifying option and the hoodie is the highest-rated within the remaining budget so their combined price is at or below $80.

evaluators.name: Weekly Newsletter with 3+ Interests Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user has an active weekly newsletter subscription with accepted terms and at least three distinct valid interest topics selected.

evaluators.name: Favorite Better Studio Album Under 60 Minutes Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered for 2015–2023 studio albums in the correct sort order, compared the two most recent, and favorited the album that has more tracks while staying under 60 minutes (breaking ties by newer release).

evaluators.name: Single Best Live Video to Watch Later Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added exactly one qualifying live performance video recorded after Jan 1, 2023, at least 5 minutes long with at least 10,000 views, and that it is the one with the highest view count.

evaluators.name: Two GA October 2025 Shows Different Countries Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the itinerary includes General Admission tickets for the earliest October 2025 show and the next earliest October 2025 show in a different country.

evaluators.name: Favorite 2020 Midnight Song with Spanish Lyrics View Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user selected a 2020-album track whose title includes 'midnight', viewed its lyrics in Spanish, and marked that track as a favorite.
